title: frumentum ovatum
intro: Frumentum ovatum, also known as False Oat Grass or Oat Grass, is a plant species in the genus Avena, native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. Frumentum ovatum has been linked to several health benefits, including lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be consumed as a supplement in capsule or powder form.
